steps: To a 500 mL Bottle, add 350 mL Water undetermined Distilled Water Contributed by users
Add 100 mL 100% Methanol undetermined Methanol P212121 Catalog #PA-33900HPLCCS4L
Add 50 mL Glacial Acetic Acid undetermined Acetic acid, glacial Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #537020
